title: Tropicana
description: adds Oranges and Pineapples for now, more deco and utilities later on...
body: ![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nRWL3LK3/images/bb22202ac7a3820f05a31106bd927aed396e0f94.png ) # Summary This mod adds oranges and pineapples, these can be turned into other foodstuff that can have unique features. # Oranges ah yes, the fruit that is good and tasty (bananas don't count), these can be obtained by breaking birch leaves (THIS WILL BE CHANGED LATER) #### Orange Juice The orange is quite tasty and easy to be drank (half a second exactly), this will leave you starving for me food because of high content of sugar. #### Orange Chicken Is regular cooked chicken not good enough for you? Just squirt some orange and you made it more nourishing. # Pineapples Yet another fruit, to find it you need to break jungle leaves (WILL BE CHANGED LATER) first of all in order to be eaten you need to srape off the crown (There is an alt recipe for those who do not have knifes from farmers delight). The pineapple can be worn providing minimal protection to suit your flashy design. #### Scoop A simple tool for those who don't have [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-fabric 'Check Them Out!') installed. #### Uncut Pineapple Good luck stuffing that in your mouth, upon consuming you take damage because of it's spikes. Also it makes you spew out the pineapple heart. #### Pineapple Now you cut off the crown! It is still going to take some time to gulp that down into your mouth. Upon eating it you may also have a chance to spew out the heart. ## Tropedia New To The Mod? The Tropedia Has You Covered! #### Advancement Tab (Coming Soon) People who won't be reading this needs a way to guide themselves to find the tropical fruits. #### Is the mod for me? If you are looking for more foods, with unique features and such, then this mod is for you. Just check for updates cause more food is going to be added (and integration with other mods). #### Looking Forward First mod that I made if all goes well and I am motivated I would love to do a biome dedicated for the orange and the pineapple (Data packs don't count for some reason), Also a wood type for the orange would suit well for this mod. And a lot of foods using these tropical fruits (Juice, Fruit Salad, etc). # Other Projects!
